articles.title: Fed Chair Jerome Powell Just Broke 75 Years of Precedent With a Move That's Likely to Frustrate President Trump. How Will This Impact the Stock Market? - The Motley Fool
articles.snippet: # Fed Chair Jerome Powell Just Broke 75 Years of Precedent With a Move That's Likely to Frustrate President Trump. Powell recently announced he plans to remain on the Federal Reserve Board of Governors even after his term as board chair ends. * While Jerome Powell's term as chair of the Fed's Board
